summary_en: Board resolution on capital cost and stock price-conscious management. Phase 1 framework: capital market assessment and transformation roadmap. Specific metrics and targets not disclosed in cover page.
title_en: Response toward realizing management conscious of capital cost and stock price
translation_en_brief: On 26 May 2026, Sanoh Industrial Co., Ltd. held a board meeting to decide on a response framework titled 'Realizing management conscious of capital cost and stock price.' The company has analyzed and evaluated its current state and determined its future approach strategy. The filing is presented as Phase 1, comprising a capital market assessment and a transformation roadmap. Specific numerical targets, KPI metrics, and timeline details are contained in the attached appendix and are not disclosed on the cover page of this announcement.
